title: taraxacum boreale
intro: Taraxacum boreale, also known as the Northern dandelion, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family, characterized by its yellow flowers and jagged leaves. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Taraxacum boreale include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve liver function, and support the immune system. Taraxacum boreale can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems.
